title: lithocarpus wenzigianus
intro: Lithocarpus wenzigianus, also known as Wenzig's copper beech or Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree native to China. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus wenzigianus include potential uses in treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Lithocarpus wenzigianus can be made into tea, decoctions, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
